diagrams.title: SIEM Data Flow Architecture
diagrams.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">SIEM Architecture and Components</text>
  
  <!-- Data Sources -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Data Sources
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Log Collection -->
  <rect x="200" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Log Collection
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Normalization -->
  <rect x="200" y="120" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Normalization
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Correlation Engine -->
  <rect x="200" y="180" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Correlation Engine
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Storage -->
  <rect x="200" y="240" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Storage
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Dashboard -->
  <rect x="320" y="180" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="360" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Dashboard
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows -->
  <path d="M170 80 L200 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M260 100 L260 120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M260 160 L260 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M260 220 L260 240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M320 200 L280 200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Data Source Icons -->
  <circle cx="70" y="80" r="8" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="90" y="80" r="8" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.45s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="110" y="80" r="8" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="130" y="80" r="8" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.55s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
</svg>
